violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2026

A turkey was observed thawing in stagnant water in the 3 bay sink. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2026

Cookies, tuna salad, and nuts/nut & chocolate packaged in the food establishment are lacking complete labels, with ingredients and/or sub-ingredients missing. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the restaurant side, and in the basement storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2026
The hand washing sink in the front service area on the restaurant side was not in good repair, with the hot water handle leaking. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the can opener base, and condiment bins have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. The non-food contact surfaces of the freezer have an accumulation of frost, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2026
The floor and walls in the basement is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2026

Strawberries were washed then placed back into original container. Fruits & vegetables are to be placed in clean sanitized containers after washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the tables beneath grills have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024
The walls in the basement are in poor repair, with severe water damage. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2025
The ceiling in the basement is in poor repair, with water-damaged and missing tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2025
The basement floor is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2025

The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, mixer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Items are to be cleaned and sanitized before use. New Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024

Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024

Soups packaged in the food establishment are lacking complete labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024

The concentration of the sanitizer solution for the wet wiping cloths in the sandwich area was 0 parts per million (ppm) in the daily, and in excess of 100 ppm in the kitchen. The required concentration for chlorine sanitizer is 50-100 ppm. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the basement, sandwich area, and beside the condiment bins in the eating area. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: the door tracks of the deli case the can opener base mixer tables beneath the grill and flattop grill Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024
The walls in the basement are in poor repair, with severe water damage. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2025
The basement floor is in poor repair, with broken, water damaged, and missing tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2025
The ceiling in the basement is in poor repair, with water damaged and missing ceiling tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. English Responding to Vomiting and Diarrhea New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024
Employees were observed donning gloves without washing their hands. Food employees must wash their hands before putting on gloves. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024

Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024

ROP frozen fish observed thawing in a pan of water on the counter with intact packaging. Packaging was cut open, and fish placed in walk in to continue thawing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024

Soups and chicken salad packaged in the food establishment are complete lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024

The concentration of the sanitizer solution for the wet wiping cloths was 200 parts per million (ppm). The required concentration for chlorine sanitizer is 50-100 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the basement, deli, and sandwich areas. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024
Deli trays observed not in good repair, with edge pieces missing. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of food residue and other debris: tables beneath the grill and flattop grill can opener base mixer slicer deli display case door tracks Chest freezers have an accumulation of frost and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024

The insulation on a duct over the area at the top of the basement stairs is in poor repair, torn with spun insulation exposed. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2024
The walls in the basement are in poor repair, with severe water damage. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2025
The basement floor is in poor repair, with broken, water damaged, and missing tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2025
The ceiling in the basement is in poor repair, with water damaged and missing ceiling tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the clean storage area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024
